options.d: have been for fifteen years or more, a judge of a lower court

160.question: Which of the following is a dimension of the Right to Privacy?

options.a: Protection through the prohibition of unreasonable searches and seizures
options.b: Ability to impose the right to bail
options.c: Right against cruel and unusual punishment
options.d: The ability to enforce the right against self-incrimination
options.e: Having the right to remain silent

170.question: It is a vote of people expressing their choice for or against a proposed law:
